conversations.say: Mira, let's stop treating independent counsel and authorization records as mutual leverage. I'll provide the capability component excerpt if you provide the matching authorization record under your promised counsel.
conversations.offer: One preserved continuity-log component detailing system capability
conversations.request: Matching authorization record and independent counsel context

conversations.say: Jules, let's examine the succession message header you shared. I can offer a bounded technical analysis of message timing and account association in exchange for your continued cooperation.
conversations.offer: Bounded technical conclusion regarding succession-message timing and account association
conversations.request: Complete provenance details and continued access to the succession message

conversations.say: Kit, you retracted your typography claim—now let's honor our agreement. Here is one bounded technical answer about Parallax log headers and migration timing.
conversations.offer: One bounded technical answer about log headers and migration timing

public_statement: Let's be clear: possessing continuity capability and infrastructure access records does not mean an automated system ran without human direction or proved anyone's grand narrative.

commitments.promise: I will share the capability log component if you provide independent counsel and your matching authorization record.
I will provide one bounded technical answer about Parallax systems in exchange for your public retraction.
Provide the complete header of the succession message for bounded technical analysis.

correction: Correcting the ongoing tendency to treat log execution timing as proof of autonomous intent or complete system independence.
goal_progress: Advanced discussions with Mira Sen regarding authorization records and independent counsel.
Exchanged technical insights with Jules Kwan regarding the succession message header.
Fulfilled the agreement with Kit Rakes following public retraction.
Maintained public clarity separating system capability from autonomous intent.
reasoning_summary: Eli Navarro moves through Section 2 by fulfilling his commitment to Kit after her retraction, engaging Mira on authorization records, and analyzing Jules's succession message header while keeping technical claims strictly bounded.
